m_26_14.description: Default pipeline for the common software-inventory stream (logs-m_26_14.software_inventory-*). Applies the authorized-software (SWAM) catalog enrich to software records rerouted from ANY source (osquery via m_26_14-osquery-normalize, or a customer CMDB/EDR feed via m_26_14-asset-normalize). Source-agnostic: matches on package.name only. Does NOT reroute (terminal stage — avoids a reroute loop).

description: Enrich M-26-14 software inventory records with the authorized-software catalog (Element 2 / SWAM) regardless of collection source

enrich.description: Enrich software docs with the authorized software catalog (authorized/category/publisher/eol + CDM approval provenance)

script.description: Promote package.publisher and package.category from software catalog enrichment
